prompt: Use the reference image of a healthy clavicle (image 2) to repair the fractured clavicle in the source X-ray (image 1). Seamlessly reconstruct the broken bone segment by aligning the anatomy and preserving the radiographic texture.
prompt_refined: Edit the source X-ray (image 1) by repairing the fractured left clavicle. Use the healthy left clavicle shown in the reference X-ray (image 2) as a guide for anatomical reconstruction. Seamlessly reconstruct the broken bone segments to appear as a single, intact clavicle, preserving the original radiographic texture and bone density.
objects: Fractured left clavicle (should not be present)
